nasb.text: For their vine is from the vine of Sodom, And from the fields of Gomorrah; Their grapes are grapes of poison, Their clusters, bitter.

esv.text: For their vine comes from the vine of Sodom and from the fields of Gomorrah; their grapes are grapes of poison; their clusters are bitter;

cnv.text: 因為他們的葡萄樹，是所多瑪的葡萄樹所出的， 是蛾摩拉的田地所生的； 他們的葡萄是毒葡萄， 每一掛都是苦的。

ccb.text: 他们犹如来自所多玛、 长在蛾摩拉的葡萄树， 结的葡萄粒粒有毒，串串苦涩；
